get.description: List the operations for the provider
Lists agents in a resource group.

post.description:
Creates a new thread and run for the agent. Returns 202 Accepted with run tracking info.
The client should poll GET threadRuns/{runId} for completion.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The content of the action request

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

get.description: Lists thread runs for a thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

post.description:
Creates a new run on an existing thread. Returns 202 Accepted with run tracking info.
The client should poll GET threadRuns/{runId} for completion.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The content of the action request

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

parameters.name: runId

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread run.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

parameters.name: runId

put.description:
Creates or updates a thread run via PUT for ARM/Bicep compatibility.
The "latest" name is a logical identifier — the actual run ID is generated server-side.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread.

Agent.description: An AI Agent resource that can execute runs within threads.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

AgentListResult.description: The response of a Agent list operation.

value.description: The Agent items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

displayName.description: The friendly display name for the agent.

description.description: A description of the agent's purpose.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the agent.

AllowToolUse.description: Whether tool invocation is permitted during a thread run.

values.name: Enabled
values.description: Tool invocation is enabled during the run

values.name: Disabled
values.description: Tool invocation is disabled during the run

Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceProvisioni.description: The provisioning state of a resource type.

LatestThreadRun.description:
Singleton resource representing the latest thread run.
Provides PUT endpoint for ARM/Bicep compatibility at threadRuns/latest.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

Message.description: A message within a thread run. Records the conversation history.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

MessageListResult.description: The response of a Message list operation.

value.description: The Message items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

messageType.description: The type of message (system_message, tool_call, tool_return, assistant_message).

source.description: The source of the message (system, user, actor, planner, critic).

content.description: The content of the message. For tool_call/tool_return messages, this may contain JSON.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was created.

MessageType.description: The type of message in a thread run.

ResumePolicy.description: The resume policy for a thread run.

values.name: None
values.description: No specific policy — default behavior, starts the thread run

Thread.description: A conversation thread for an agent. Tracks message history and run state.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ThreadListResult.description: The response of a Thread list operation.

value.description: The Thread items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

status.description: The lifecycle status of the thread.

lastRunId.description: The ID of the most recent thread run.

ThreadRun.description: A single execution run on a thread. Tracks run status, timing, and results.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ThreadRunListResult.description: The response of a ThreadRun list operation.

value.description: The ThreadRun items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

startTime.description: The timestamp when the run started.

endTime.description: The timestamp when the run completed.

error.description: Error details if the run failed.

ThreadRunRequest.description: Request body for creating and running a thread.

allowToolUse.description: Whether tool invocation is permitted during the run. Defaults to enabled.

resumePolicy.description: The resume policy for the run. Defaults to none.

inputOverrides.description: Optional input overrides as key-value pairs.

message.description: The input message from the user.

model.description:
Optional model URL override. When specified, this URL is used for all agents
instead of the model URL from the agent definitions.

ThreadRunResponse.description: Response body returned when a thread run is accepted.

runId.description: The ID of the created run.

status.description: The current status of the run.

ThreadStatus.description: The lifecycle status of a thread.

values.name: Idle
values.description: The thread is idle and not currently running

values.name: AwaitingInput
values.description: The thread is awaiting user input
